subparts.text: Differentiate between the self-centering three jaw chuck and independent four jaw chuck with neat sketch. 01
Explain the different type of chips formed during orthogonal cutting with the neat sketch 01
Draw the neat diagram of drill bit mentioning various tool nomenclature. 02
What is the purpose of face plate? Explain. 02
Differentiate between the conventional lathe with CNC lathe with the help of suitable diagram. 01
Explain the single point cutting tool. Also, write the various tool signatures of single point cutting tool with suitable diagram. 01
What are the selection criteria for cutting tool material? Explain any five cutting tool materials. 01
What is the use of drilling machine? Draw and explain the various constructional features of shaper machine with neat sketch. 02
Explain the various operation performed on drilling machine with suitable diagram: drilling, reaming, counter boring, counter sinking, tapping. 02
Explain the various operation performed on Lathe machine with suitable diagram: tapering, facing, knurling, chamfering. 02
